{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sayamatsutsumino Shrine'''|狭山堤神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kawachi Province]].
